siri_text: Monday's workout. Strength: Deadlift, 4 by 6 at 40 percent. Strength: Romanian Deadlift (RDL), 4 by 10 at 40 percent. Strength: Seated Cable Row, 3 by 10. Strength: Hamstring Curl, 3 by 10. Metcon: AMRAP 15 minutes: 6 Deadlift 80/60, 12 Wall Ball 9/6, 15 American KB Swing 24/16. For hypertrophy, focus on chest, shoulders, biceps.
